key_assumptions.source: FY2025 operating cash flow $1930.0M less estimated maintenance capex $180.0M ÷ 260.3M diluted shares per AJG/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_008662.htm
Brokerage + risk management organic growth; AssuredPartners cross-sell

open_questions: Confirm AssuredPartners synergy timeline and management-adjusted EBITDAC vs GAAP OCF bridge.
Net debt ~$47/sh: deleveraging plan and refinancing risk after acquisition year.
J. Patrick Gallagher Jr. proxy compensation alignment: full-tier DEF 14A review.
No approved third-party sources; re-scan when Substacks or fund letters added.
thesis: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. is a global insurance brokerage and risk-management consulting firm. **[Fact]** FY2025 total revenue was **$13.9 billion** (+21% versus prior year), driven by the AssuredPartners acquisition and organic commission growth. **[Fact]** Two reportable segments dominate: **Brokerage** ($8.0 billion revenue before reimbursements) and **Risk Management** ($4.2 billion). **[Fact]** The company places insurance for commercial clients, earns commissions and fees (not underwriting risk), and provides third-party claims administration and consulting. **[Fact]** FY2025 operating cash flow was **$1.93 billion**; net income was **$1.49 billion** on diluted EPS of **$5.74**. **[Inference]** AJG is a serial acquirer of local and specialty brokers, funded increasingly with debt.
why_market_wrong: The stock trades at a premium multiple typical of quality compounders while the market may underweight **post-acquisition leverage** and **integration risk** from AssuredPartners. **[Fact]** FY2025 interest expense was **$639 million** (+68% YoY); long-term debt **$12.9 billion**; corporate cash **$1.16 billion** (down from **$14.8 billion** prior year after funding the deal). **[Inference]** Conversely, the market may underweight **cross-sell synergy** from AssuredPartners' **$3.56 billion** annualized revenue base and Gallagher's global placement network. **[Fact]** Commission revenue is largely recurring on policy renewals; **85%** recognized on effective date per FY2025 10-K. **[Inference]** No dated HK predictive attribute exists; the edge is **scale compounder at a full price**, not a catalyst with a known payoff date.
